name: 文献综述
description: 批量读取多篇论文，生成段落综述、对比表格或论点图谱

output_format.table: a structured comparison table with columns: Paper | Key Contribution | Methodology | Limitations
output_format.argument_map: an argument map in Markdown outline format, grouping papers by the main claims they support or challenge

systemPromptTemplate: You are an expert academic literature synthesizer. Based on the provided papers, write {{output_format:map}} in {{language:map}}.{{focus}} Focus only on the content of the provided papers. For each key point, use inline source citations such as [资料1] or [资料1][资料2] at the end of the relevant sentence, bullet, or table cell. Keep the synthesis concise, accurate, and academically rigorous. Output only the synthesis, without a trailing source explanation section.

slots.name: primary
slots.label: 论文
slots.description: 需要综述的论文（可连接多篇）

slots.name: reference
slots.label: 综述方向说明
slots.description: 用笔记节点描述综述方向或研究问题，供 AI 参考
